kirundi.use_random_block_in_a_repeat_loop: Koresha agace katoranijwe muri loop yo gusubiramwo
kirundi.drag_a_move_forward_block_to_your_prog: Kurura agace ko kuja imbere muri porogaramu yawe hanyuma ufyonde tangiza!
kirundi.draw_a_square_using_move_and_turn_bloc: Shushanya kare ukoresheje udutsi two kuja no guhindukira.
kirundi.draw_the_same_square_using_a_repeat_bl: Shushanya kare imwe ukoresheje agace ko gusubiramwo.
kirundi.use_repeat_4_with_move_forward_and_tur: Koresha gusubiramwo 4× hamwe no kuja imbere no guhindukira iburyo 90° imbere.
kirundi.use_set_color_blocks_between_your_move: Koresha udutsi two gushiraho ibara hagati y'udutsi twawe two kuja imbere.
kirundi.create_any_drawing_with_20_line_segmen: Rema igishushanyo ico ari co cose gifite uduce tw'umurongo 20+.
kirundi.draw_a_house_a_square_base_with_a_tria: Shushanya inzu: urufatiro rwa kare rufite igisenge c'umutatu hejuru.
kirundi.draw_a_square_then_use_pen_up_to_move_: Shushanya kare, hanyuma ukoreshe zamura ikaramu kugira ngo wimuke, hanyuma ushushanye umutatu w'igisenge. Iyumvira ku mfuruka: kare = 90°, umutatu = 120°.
kirundi.study_this_finished_square_then_click_: Iga iyi kare yarangiye, hanyuma ufyonde tangiza kugira ngo ubone uko ishushanywa.
kirundi.notice_the_pattern_move_turn_repeated_: Menya ishusho: ja, hindukira, vyasubiyemo inshuro enye.
kirundi.this_loop_should_draw_a_square_but_it_: Iyi loop yagomvye gushushanya kare ariko guhindukira kurabuze. Ongeraho hindukira iburyo 90 muri gusubiramwo.
kirundi.add_turn_right_90_after_the_move_forwa: Muri agace ko gusubiramwo, nyuma yo kuja imbere ongeraho hindukira iburyo 90.
kirundi.repeat_three_times_move_forward_then_t: Subiramwo inshuro eshatu: ja imbere, hanyuma hindukira 120.
kirundi.almost_a_hexagon_add_the_missing_turn_: Hafi y'impande esheshatu. Ongeraho guhindukira kwabuze muri loop kugira ngo uyugare.
kirundi.add_turn_right_60_after_the_move_forwa: Muri agace ko gusubiramwo, nyuma yo kuja imbere ongeraho hindukira iburyo 60.
kirundi.check_if_standing_on_a_gem: Raba nimba uhagaze ku ibuye ry'agaciro
kirundi.move_forward_then_turn_then_move_forwa: Ja imbere, hanyuma hindukira, hanyuma ja imbere nanone.
kirundi.use_a_repeat_block_to_reach_the_goal_e: Koresha agace ko gusubiramwo kugira ngo ugere ku ntego mu buryo bunoze.
kirundi.move_to_each_gem_and_use_collect_gem_o: Ja kuri buri ibuye ry'agaciro kandi ukoreshe «Kusanya ibuye ry'agaciro» kuri buri rimwe.
kirundi.use_if_wall_ahead_to_navigate_a_maze_w: Koresha «Nimba urukuta ruri imbere» kugira ngo unyure mu rusobe rufite imihindukire!
kirundi.combine_while_not_at_goal_with_if_wall: Huza «Mu gihe utaragera ku ntego» na «Nimba urukuta ruri imbere» → hindukira iburyo, bitabaye ivyo → ja imbere.
kirundi.use_repeat_with_move_forward_and_paint: Koresha gusubiramwo hamwe na «Ja imbere» na «Saka akagari».
kirundi.try_while_not_at_goal_if_wall_turn_rig: Gerageza «Mu gihe utaragera ku ntego»: nimba urukuta → hindukira iburyo, bitabaye ivyo → ja imbere.
kirundi.collect_all_gems_and_reach_the_goal_us: Kusanya amabuye y'agaciro yose ugere ku ntego! Koresha ivyo wize vyose.
kirundi.plan_your_path_carefully_you_may_need_: Tegura inzira yawe witonze. Ushobora gukenera loops zishizwe imbere y'izindi!
kirundi.each_block_is_a_command_set_values_wit: Buri kace ni itegeko. Shiraho indangagaciro ukoresheje uduce tw'imibare. Kurura udutsi kugira ngo utondekanye!
kirundi.click_run_to_watch_your_program_execut: Fyonda tangiza kugira ngo urabe porogaramu yawe ikora intambwe ku ntambwe kuri canvas.
kirundi.try_challenges_to_learn_cs_concepts_li: Gerageza imbogamizi kugira ngo wige ivyiyumviro vya siyansi ya mudasobwa nka loops kandi ubone XP! 🏆
kirundi.switch_to_code_mode_for_javascript_lik: Hindukira mu buryo bw'ikode kubera syntax nka JavaScript. Vyose biguma bihuza!
kirundi.sub_millisecond_imperceptible_to_user_: Munsi ya miliseconde imwe. Ntivyumvikana ku mukoresha. Bitekanye kuri loops zo imbere zihagaze.
kirundi.1_ms_well_within_frame_rate_budget_saf: < 1 miliseconde. Mu ngengo y'umuvuduko w'amashusho mu buryo bwiza; bitekanye kuri abacunga ibikorwa vya UI.
kirundi.1ms_1s_will_visibly_lag_ui_needs_progr: 1ms–1s. Bizatinza UI ku buryo bugaragara; bisaba umurongo w'iterambere canke kwimurirwa hanze ya thread nyamukuru.
kirundi.practically_infinite_at_this_scale_nee: Mu vy'ukuri ntibirangira kuri uru rugero. Bisaba algorithm nziza canke input ntoya.
kirundi.set_input_size_loop_depth_data_structu: Shiraho ingano ya input, ubujakuzimu bwa loop, imiterere y'amakuru n'imiterere ya recursion. Hanura uko ikode yawe izakora vuba (canke buhoro) mbere yo kuyigerageza. Nta manota, nta guhishura.
kirundi.your_hypothesis_which_change_buys_the_: Iciyumviro cawe (ni iyihe mpinduka igura umuvuduko munini — n ntoya, loops nke, canke imiterere y'amakuru itandukanye?)
kirundi.e_g_swapping_array_scan_for_hash_looku: Urugero, gusimbuza gusikana array no gushaka hash kugabanya ikiguzi ca loop yo hanze ku gipimo ca n…
kirundi.why_does_loop_depth_multiply_rather_th: Kuki ubujakuzimu bwa loop bukuba umubare w'ibikorwa aho kuvyongeraho?
kirundi.for_very_small_n_sometimes_o_n_beats_o: Kuri n ntoya cane, rimwe na rimwe O(n²) inesha O(n log n). Kuki?
kirundi.i_can_explain_why_this_combination_of_: Nshobora gusigura impamvu iri huriro rya n, ubujakuzimu, imiterere y'amakuru na recursion rigarukira hano.
kirundi.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Widget y'iperereza — nta manota, nta guhishura, nta rupfunguzo rw'igisubizo. Imibare y'ibikorwa ni igereranyo ry'uburezi n'iry'urugero rifata ~1 GHz ya throughput nyayo; imikorere nyayo ishingiye kuri cache, branch prediction, JIT n'ibihagararo bibanziriza ijambo Big-O.
kirundi.ai_explains_what_your_code_does: AI isigura ico ikode yawe ikora
kirundi.ai_suggests_what_to_try_next: AI itanga iciyumviro c'ico wagerageza ubutaha
kirundi.move_forward_turn_pen_down_a_few_primi: Ja imbere, hindukira, manura ikaramu: amabwiriza make y'ibanze → fractals, inzunguruka, polygones. Igitabo ca Seymour Papert Mindstorms (1980) cerekanye ko abana bashobora kubaka ubwenge bw'imibare bigisha inkeri, atari ku rundi ruhande.
kirundi.sequencing_conditionals_loops_function: Gukurikiranya → ibisabwa → loops → functions, vyafunzwe mu rusobe ushobora kubona. Bigaragaza Karel the Robot (Stanford 1981) n'ibisakuzo vya code.org bigezweho. Amakosa abaye ay'umwanya: «yakubise urukuta».
kirundi.drag_commands_into_your_program_use_if: 💡 Kurura amabwiriza muri porogaramu yawe. Koresha udutsi twa nimba/mu gihe ku rugendo rw'ubwenge!
kirundi.click_commands_from_the_toolbox_to_bui: Fyonda amabwiriza aturutse mu gasanduku k'ibikoresho kugira ngo wubake porogaramu yawe!
kirundi.click_blocks_above_or_load_a_template_: Fyonda udutsi turi hejuru canke pakira inyandiko-rugero kugira ngo utangure
kirundi.commands_forward_n_backward_n_right_de: Amabwiriza: forward(n) backward(n) right(deg) left(deg) penUp() penDown() setColor("#hex") setWidth(n) circle(r) goto(x,y) home() arc(angle,radius) stamp() playNote(freq,dur). Impinduka: setVar("name",value) changeVar("name",delta) random("name",min,max) — koresha impinduka na $ (nka forward($name)). Loops na logique bikoresha curly braces: repeat(n){ ... }  while (x < 450){ ... }  if (x > 250){ ... } else { ... }. Functions: function myShape(){ ... } hanyuma uyihamagare na myShape(). Ibisabwa bigereranya x, y, angle canke $var bikoresheje > < >= <= == != .
